post.description: Authenticates a user and returns an access + refresh token pair.
Issues a new access + refresh token pair, rotating the refresh token.
Creates a new user account. Superadmin accounts cannot be created via this endpoint.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of parents. Tenant-scoped.

post.description: Creates a user account (role=orangtua) and parent profile atomically.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's name and/or avatar.

get.description: Returns paginated schools. Superadmin sees all; others see their own.

post.description: Creates a new school tenant. Superadmin only.

get.description: Returns a single school. Others can only fetch their own school.

put.description: Updates school fields. admin_sekolah can update their own school; superadmin can update any and change status.

get.description: Returns all key-value rules for a school.

put.description: Creates or updates multiple key-value rules for a school.

get.description: Returns the active subscription for a school.
Returns a paginated list of students. Tenant-scoped.

parameters.description: Search by name, email, NIS or NISN
parameters.name: search

post.description: Creates a user account (role=siswa) and student profile atomically.

get.description: Returns a student with parent links. Tenant-scoped.

post.description: Links an existing parent profile to a student.

delete.description: Removes the link between a parent and a student.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users. Admin sekolah sees only their school. Superadmin sees all.

parameters.description: Search by name, email or username
parameters.name: search

get.description: Returns a single user. Admin sekolah can only fetch users within their school.

put.description: Updates name and/or avatar. Admin sekolah can only update users in their school.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a user. Admin sekolah cannot deactivate other admins.

put.description: Changes a user's password. Users must supply their current password; superadmin can skip it.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
